results.rendered_html:
pra-√śaṃs P. Ā. -śaṃsati, ˚te, (irreg. Pot. -śaṃsīyāt,  Cāṇ. ), to proclaim, declare, praise, laud, extol,  RV.  &c. &c.;
to urge on, stimulate,  RV. i, 84, 19 ;
to approve, esteem, value (with na, to disapprove, blame),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to foretell, prophesy,  Cāṇ.

results.rendered_html:
praśaṃs 1 P.
1 To praise, extol, approve, speak approvingly of, commend; hariṇā yuvatiḥ praśaśaṃse  Gīt. 1 ; yacca bācā praśasyate  Ms. 5. 127 ; prāśaṃsīttaṃ niśācaraḥ  Bk. 15. 65 ;  R. 5. 25 ; 17. 36. 
2 To esteem, value.
3 To declare.
